title: Flint Configuration
description: Configuration file for the Flint linter (@flickjs/lint)

$schema.description: URL or path to the Flint JSON Schema

detect.description: Auto-detect project frameworks and enable matching built-in rules

no-explicit-any.description: Avoid TypeScript `any` in favor of safer types.

no-console.description: Flag console calls that leak debug output into runtime code.

no-empty-catch.description: Catch blocks should handle, log, or rethrow errors.

prefer-const.description: Use `const` when a binding is never reassigned.

no-unused-vars.description: Surface declared bindings that are never used.

unreachable-code.description: Flag statements that can never execute after control flow exits.

no-missing-return.description: Require consistent returns from functions that should produce a value.

unused-export.description: Show exports that are never imported anywhere else in the project.

unused-file.description: Show files that are never imported by any other file.

unused-dependency.description: Show package.json dependencies that are never imported.

no-eval.description: Block dynamic code execution APIs such as `eval` and string timers.

no-hardcoded-secrets.description: Catch literal secrets committed directly in source.

no-chained-array-iterations.description: Prefer collapsing chained array passes into a single traversal.

no-regexp-in-loop.description: Move regular expression construction out of hot loops.

prefer-math-min-max.description: Use `Math.min` or `Math.max` instead of sorting to pick extremes.

no-sequential-style-assignment.description: Batch style writes instead of mutating many properties one by one.

no-array-find-in-loop.description: Avoid `find()` scans inside loops when indexing or caching is cheaper.

no-duplicate-storage-reads.description: Reuse repeated storage reads instead of fetching the same key multiple times.

no-deep-nesting.description: Flag deeply nested control flow that is hard to scan and optimize.

prefer-promise-all.description: Run independent async work concurrently with `Promise.all`.

react/no-derived-state-effect.description: Derive render state directly instead of syncing it through effects.

react/no-fetch-in-effect.description: Move fetches out of `useEffect` when a better data flow exists.

react/no-cascading-set-state.description: Avoid stacking many state updates inside a single effect.

react/no-effect-event-handler.description: Do not use `useEffect` as an event-handler wrapper.

react/no-derived-use-state.description: Avoid initializing state directly from props when it can be derived.

react/prefer-use-reducer.description: Prefer `useReducer` once state transitions become coordinated or complex.

react/lazy-state-init.description: Use lazy initializers for expensive `useState` defaults.

react/functional-set-state.description: Use functional updates when the next state depends on the previous value.

react/unstable-deps.description: Keep hook dependency arrays stable and explicit.

react/no-array-index-key.description: Avoid array indexes as React keys on dynamic lists.

react/no-prevent-default.description: Be deliberate about canceling native browser behavior in JSX handlers.

react/no-giant-component.description: Surface oversized components that need decomposition.

react/no-render-in-render.description: Avoid calling `render*()` helpers inline from JSX trees.

react/no-nested-component.description: Keep component definitions at module scope, not inside renders.

react/no-usememo-simple-expr.description: Skip `useMemo` around trivial expressions that do not need caching.

react/no-unstable-motion-props.description: Keep motion prop objects stable across renders.

react/no-layout-animation.description: Avoid layout animations on hot React surfaces.

react/no-animate-presence-in-list.description: Do not wrap list rendering directly in `AnimatePresence`.

react/no-motion-in-list.description: Keep motion-heavy elements out of large list renders.

react/no-prop-on-memo.description: Avoid recreating props that defeat memoized components.

react/no-hydration-flicker.description: Flag patterns that cause visible client/server hydration flicker.

react/no-transition-all.description: Avoid broad `transition: all` rules on interactive UI.

react/no-blur-filter.description: Flag heavy blur filters that are expensive to render.

react/no-heavy-shadow.description: Flag expensive shadow styles that hurt paint performance.

react/no-barrel-import.description: Avoid barrel imports on hot paths when they inflate bundles.

react/no-full-lodash.description: Avoid importing the full Lodash bundle.

react/no-moment.description: Avoid Moment.js where lighter date utilities are enough.

react/prefer-dynamic-import.description: Load heavy dependencies lazily with dynamic imports.

react/use-lazy-motion.description: Use `LazyMotion` when shipping Framer Motion to the client.

react/no-undeferred-script.description: Defer non-critical scripts so they do not block rendering.

nextjs/no-img-element.description: Prefer `next/image` over raw `` in Next.js apps.

nextjs/no-head-element.description: Avoid raw `<head>` usage in Next.js components.

nextjs/no-head-import.description: Avoid `next/head` in modern App Router code.

nextjs/no-document-import.description: Restrict `next/document` imports to custom document files.

nextjs/missing-metadata.description: Require route metadata on pages that should declare it.

nextjs/no-side-effect-in-get-handler.description: Keep GET handlers free of mutations and side effects.

nextjs/no-async-client-component.description: Client components should not be declared `async`.

react/server-auth-actions.description: Require auth checks before mutating inside server actions.

react/server-after-nonblocking.description: Wrap non-blocking side effects in `after()` inside server actions.

react-native/no-inline-styles.description: Avoid inline style objects on React Native surfaces.

react-native/no-inline-callbacks.description: Avoid recreating inline callbacks on native components.

react-native/no-anonymous-list-render.description: Keep `renderItem` stable instead of recreating it inline.

react-native/no-scrollview-list.description: Prefer virtualized lists over mapping large collections in `ScrollView`.

react-native/no-raw-text.description: Wrap text in `Text` instead of rendering raw strings directly.

react-native/no-alert.description: Avoid platform alerts as a default UX escape hatch.

react-native/no-image-uri-literal.description: Avoid hardcoded remote image URIs in JSX.

react-native/require-key-extractor.description: Provide `keyExtractor` for virtualized React Native lists.

server/no-sql-injection.description: Avoid building SQL with request-controlled interpolation.

server/no-shell-injection.description: Do not pass dynamic input to shell execution APIs.

server/no-path-traversal.description: Avoid feeding request data directly into filesystem paths.

server/no-unsafe-redirect.description: Do not redirect to request-controlled destinations.

server/no-cors-wildcard.description: Do not combine wildcard CORS origins with credentials.

server/no-hardcoded-jwt-secret.description: Avoid shipping hardcoded JWT signing secrets.

server/no-unhandled-async-route.description: Async route handlers should catch and translate failures.

server/no-swallowed-error.description: Catch blocks must surface, handle, or rethrow server errors.

server/no-process-exit-in-handler.description: Do not call `process.exit()` inside request handlers.

server/require-error-status.description: Always set an explicit HTTP status on error responses.

server/no-throw-string.description: Throw `Error` objects instead of bare strings.

server/no-n-plus-one.description: Avoid N+1 query patterns that issue a query per loop iteration.

server/no-unbounded-query.description: Require limits on database queries to prevent unbounded result sets.

server/no-sync-fs-in-handler.description: Avoid synchronous filesystem calls inside request handlers.

server/no-blocking-crypto.description: Avoid blocking crypto operations in request handlers.

server/no-large-json-parse-sync.description: Avoid synchronous parsing of large JSON payloads in handlers.

server/no-floating-transaction.description: Ensure database transactions are properly committed or rolled back.

server/no-business-logic-in-route.description: Keep route handlers thin — move business logic to service layers.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from linting
